scripts.build: pnpm --filter @storex/core run build && pnpm --filter @storex/persist run build && pnpm --filter @storex/devtools run build && pnpm --filter @storex/testing run build && pnpm --filter @storex/pinia-compat run build && pnpm --filter @storex/redux-compat run build && pnpm --filter @storex/ssr run build && pnpm --filter storex run build && pnpm --filter @storex/cli run build
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm run build && pnpm publish -r --access public
scripts.publish:npm:dry: pnpm run build && pnpm publish -r --access public --dry-run --no-git-checks
